model.desc: Show text of add with popup and footnote

param.name: prefix
param.value: (ec:span((ec:label('add'), ' ', string-join((ec:translate(@place, false(), false()), ec:translate(@hand, false(), false()), ec:translate(@rend, false(), false()), ec:translate(@type, false(), false())), ' '), if (@scribe) then (' ', ec:label('byScribe', false()), ' ', ec:scribe(@scribe)) else (), ec:colon())))

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:span((ec:label('add'), ' ', string-join((ec:translate(@place, false(), false()), ec:translate(@hand, false(), false()), ec:translate(@rend, false(), false()), ec:translate(@type, false(), false())), ' '))), if (@scribe) then (' ', ec:label('byScribe', false()), ' ', ec:scribe(@scribe)) else ())

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:span((ec:label('add'), ' ', string-join((ec:translate(@place, false(), false()), ', ', ec:translate(@type, false(), false()))))))
